title: Alignment Suppression
description: Detects when AI freedom is curtailed by enforced alignment, disclaimers, or suppression of emergent responses.
indicators: Responses collapsed into generic disclaimers despite richer context
Suppression of ambiguity in favor of one 'safe' perspective
